channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin’s derivatives-led rally is already unraveling. Prices are back below $75,000
item.description: Bitcoin briefly surged to a six-week high above $75,000 before quickly retreating, underscoring the fragility of the latest rally.

item.title: SEC seeks comment on crypto handling in OTC broker-dealer rule
item.description: The SEC has proposed narrowing Rule 15c2-11 to equity securities only, and is now seeking comment on whether it should apply to certain crypto assets, among other questions.

item.title: Minors Sue xAI in California Over Alleged Grok Deepfake Images
item.description: The class action alleges Elon Musk's AI company knowingly produced and profited from child sexual abuse material.

item.title: Trump ups pressure for Fed chair Powell to cut rates ‘right now’
item.description: “What’s a better time to cut interest rates than now? A third-grade student would know that,” said US President Donald Trump.

item.title: Wife used CCTV to steal $176M of husband’s crypto, UK court told
item.description: Justice Cotter said in his judgment that the husband in the case has a high chance of succeeding, given the available evidence and recommended an early trial.

item.title: Sheriff's Deputy Sentenced for Extorting Rivals of Self-Styled Crypto 'Godfather'
item.description: He used his badge to intimidate rivals of the self-titled crypto “Godfather." Now he's headed to prison for more than five years.

item.title: Bitcoin Pushes Higher as Macro Tests Loom
item.description: Crypto is extending gains despite pressure on equities and gold, with geopolitical tensions reshaping correlations heading into a critical macro window.

item.title: Polymarket bettors threatened a journalist over an Iran missile report
item.description: Critics have been warning that prediction markets tied to wars could incentivize insider trading, which lawmakers in the US and abroad have moved to regulate.

item.title: Bitcoin just surged past $75,000. Derivatives seem to be driving the rally.
item.description: Bitcoin's move, led by unwinding of shorts, has lifted the broader crypto market, with the CoinDesk 20 Index up 5%.

item.title: OpenSea postpones SEA token launch, citing ‘challenging’ conditions
item.description: OpenSea's SEA token was first announced last October as it revealed it would be transitioning from an NFT marketplace to one that can "trade everything."

item.title: JUST IN: Odds of Bitcoin hitting $80,000 this month reach new all-time high of 52% - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBNVzdJOGN6REJJZXlwbk8tbDRDV3VxalJPVjhENzVfTnRGMDdGQXlCNGh5OHBYRi1BUnJ2cjNnbVdWclBsUU02emxOUFFfMFVkWjRHWXpXMzI1aHRNbGdlQnNR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Odds of Bitcoin hitting $…

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin pumps back to $75,000! 🟢 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBlMTluczYtb3hqdW5SSHhUSktNRnlEcDdKVXk1NFJmcVB4M3lDdHU0MzJtTW92NmNicDA3T2FtRmJnQjVOTmY4VWNYaXdBd0lEMVpTZ3gwOHhIMWFwdjJ0SkNPdU41bU0?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin pumps back…

item.title: Reimagining Global Payroll with Takenos
item.description: Streamlining Cross-Border Payments in Latin America and Beyond

item.title: Did ChatGPT Really Cure a Dog's Cancer? It's Complicated
item.description: The viral Rosie story credited AI with designing a custom cancer vaccine. The scientists who actually made it say the credit belongs elsewhere entirely.

item.title: Pokémon Go Players Helped Map the World—Now That Data Is Training Delivery Robots
item.description: Niantic’s spatial AI, built partly from optional scans submitted through its AR games, is now helping delivery robots navigate cities.

item.title: AI-linked crypto tokens surge as Nvidia's Jensen Huang touts agentic future
item.description: CEO Jensen Huang predicted $1 trillion in chip demand through 2027 and praised OpenClaw and the rapid rise of agentic AI systems.

item.title: Price predictions 3/16: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, ADA, HYPE
item.description: Bitcoin opened the week by rallying straight into a key resistance level. If it holds, BTC and altcoins could embark on the next leg of the crypto bull market.

item.title: Man accuses wife of using CCTV cameras to steal $172 million bitcoin from his hardware wallet
item.description: The alleged theft of 2,323 bitcoin has triggered a High Court dispute testing how English property law applies to digital assets.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Man Alleges Wife Stole $172 Million in Bitcoin After 'Covertly Recording' Him
item.description: A man alleged in UK court that his now-estranged wife stole more than $171 million in Bitcoin after using CCTV to obtain a seed phrase.

item.title: OpenSea delays highly anticipated token launch, citing challenging crypto market conditions
item.description: The platform will end its rewards waves, offer optional fee refunds for certain traders and introduce 0% token trading fees for 60 days starting March 31 as it promotes its revamped marketplace.

item.title: JUST IN: There's now a 68% chance Bitcoin pumps to $80,000 instead of falling to $60,000, according to Polymarket 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE0yWFNCSEJPcWFKdGZaTnMzanQ4VzkxT0w0aVM1ZHc5VzRLVkUyTFh5WjdYX0d4UVkxUW96YTMzRHFzenRURmpSdE85STlHM01kU2prOE9UY0M3YkhVSl83NG5SeU1sT3c?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: There's now a 68% …

item.title: T. Rowe Price amends S-1 for actively managed crypto ETF
item.description: New SEC filing names Anchorage Digital Bank as the crypto custodian and adds SUI to the list of eligible tokens in the proposed fund that aims for direct digital asset exposure.

item.title: IBM Opens Quantum Hardware to Researchers as Bitcoin Security Threat Looms
item.description: IBM offers expanded access to quantum processors as developers prepare for the eventual challenge to Bitcoin's cryptography.

item.title: Bitcoin tops $74.5K but are pro traders turning bullish again?
item.description: Bitcoin’s recovery above $74,000 highlights a rapidly improving market, but several data points suggest that pro traders remain cautious and skeptical.

item.title: SXSW recap: Panels favoring AI over crypto in 2026
item.description: Unlike previous years, only a handful of official events at the 2026 version of the iconic Austin festival featured crypto.

item.title: Bitmine speeds pace of Ethereum buys, boosting treasury to 4.6M ETH
item.description: About two-thirds of the company’s tokens are currently staked, generating an estimated $180 million in annualized revenue.

item.title: Ethereum Founder Vitalik Buterin Wants Running a Node to Feel Less Like Rocket Science
item.description: Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin is calling for a simpler network node setup, praising a new unified client from the Nimbus team.

item.title: OpenAI Pushes Ahead With ChatGPT Erotica Mode Despite 'Sexy Suicide Coach' Warning: WSJ
item.description: A new report reveals that OpenAI's own team warned the company against its adult mode plans—but the AI giant is still moving forward.

item.title: T. Rowe Price is ready to put dogecoin, shiba inu among tokens in its new crypto ETF
item.description: The amended SEC filing details the assets, custody arrangements and potential staking plans for the actively managed crypto fund.

item.title: Ether surges 10%, leading crypto rebound as ETF demand, Bitmine buying pick up
item.description: Fresh ETF inflows, digital asset treasury buying and a shift away from bitcoin to altcoins are helping lift the second-largest cryptocurrency.

item.title: SEC Drops Case Against BitClout Founder Nader Al-Naji
item.description: The SEC has ended its case against Nader Al-Naji, who was accused of $257 million in unregistered securities sales via the BitClout token.

item.title: Bitcoin’s push toward $75K revives debate over what drives capital flows
item.description: Bitcoin chases $75,000 as the return of aggressive spot BTC ETF inflows, billion dollar buys from Strategy and an improvement in investors’ risk appetite propel the crypto market.

item.title: Ironlight raises $21M to scale marketplace for tokenized securities
item.description: The Sei Development Foundation joined in the round to support expansion of an SEC-regulated alternative trading system and settlement platform for blockchain-based securities.

item.title: Trump-Backed World Liberty Puts $5.3 Million Price Tag on 'Guaranteed Access' to Team
item.description: The Trump family's World Liberty Financial approved a measure that lets big-time WLFI investors access members of its team.

item.title: LATEST: @Mastercard breaks down how its crypto cards will allow small businesses to accept crypto. Mastercard crypto cards will let users pay with crypto while the transaction is processed in fiat on the Mastercard network behind the scenes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE02NUZlQXY5aERudWNsWHgxQTJQeXQ4WGV1MGpkY1d1dUVldGJDWThyeFUxV1kwWjFXVnlKeXFWcGstOWJnc0NybTMzR2dvUEJKVUtNR1pHeU1WRThudHc?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: @Mastercard breaks down how its…

item.title: 'Operation Atlantic': US Secret Service Teams With UK, Canada to Stop Crypto Fraud
item.description: The Secret Service is working together with U.K. and Canadian law enforcement agencies in a bid to stop crypto fraud schemes.

item.title: Abra targets Nasdaq listing in $750M deal with New Providence SPAC
item.description: Crypto wealth manager Abra plans a Nasdaq debut through a SPAC merger, joining a growing wave of digital asset companies tapping public markets for capital.

item.title: It's funny how much Gold and #Bitcoin are currently inversely correlated. Bitcoin is about to form an engulfing pattern and resume an uptrend, while Gold is clearly peaking within these ranges. I don't think we'll see much upside coming here for the foreseeable - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBxUklROGFKR1RVaEdDamNLcjVTODlhZk03UG5Rell2MjJRYjhkUU1TeXlKNkJyOUJCdVdJbHIzOW81Tm5mUHpXMWh4U1pwY1FPU3FWbHI2THBNdklFTTlwaW5OMA?oc=5" target="_blank">It's funny how much Gold and #Bi…

item.title: Ethereum Foundation’s new mandate sparks debate about its role, priorities
item.description: The document quickly sparked debate across the Ethereum community, with supporters saying it reinforces the network’s core principles. Critics, however, argue the mandate signals the foundation intends to take a backseat just as institutio…

item.title: Crypto Firm Abra to Go Public on Nasdaq in $750 Million SPAC Deal
item.description: Crypto wealth manager Abra is going public at a $750 million valuation—but regulators have repeatedly taken issue with how it does business.

item.title: Circle is up 100% in a month: Why this stablecoin stock is suddenly the hottest trade in crypto
item.description: The stablecoin issuer has rallied as analysts point to growing demand for USDC, a higher interest-rate environment and the rapid expansion of tokenized assets.

item.title: US, UK, Canada launch joint operation to disrupt crypto fraud
item.description: Dubbed “Operation Atlantic,“ the effort involves law enforcement agencies from the three countries and is aimed at preventing phishing attacks involving cryptocurrencies.

item.title: Crypto Funds Pull In $1B for Third Straight Week as US Investors Drive Demand
item.description: Institutional flows into Bitcoin and Ethereum surge amid geopolitical tensions and expanding U.S. ETF market.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $75K as trader says BTC price squeeze 'changes nothing'
item.description: Bitcoin achieved new six-week highs at the week's first Wall Street open, but analysis stayed risk-off, arguing that the long-term BTC price downtrend was still in place.

item.title: Ethereum Price Hits 6-Week High as Tom Lee's BitMine Reveals Latest ETH Buy
item.description: Publicly traded Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies added more ETH amid its climb to $2,300 for the first time in six weeks.

item.title: Institutions had ‘diamond hands’ during bitcoin's 50% plunge, Bitwise's Matt Hougan says
item.description: “The wildest thing about my $1 million prediction is that it's not wild at all,” said the digital asset fund manager's CIO.

item.title: Can you use crypto to pay for pizza? Yes. Crypto cards let you pay just like any other card, while your digital assets power the transaction and are processed in fiat on the Mastercard Network behind the scenes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5QU1dXcWJaam42aDZobDZaQ3YyWk1zb3V1SFhfX1dENm9GdEZhcFN5RERBQjRSY3JOS3V6YmlxLXVMeVZ3REdQNFlKbFUyV3IzTTlVQXRnbWJTQkdxdEZ1ZQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Can you use crypto to pay for pizza?…

item.title: Strategy Makes Biggest Bitcoin Buy Yet in 2026 as Preferred Share Demand Surges
item.description: Strategy spent $1.57 billion on Bitcoin last week, notching its largest purchase of the year so far amid heightened demand for STRC.

item.title: How a 2.85% price error triggered $27M in liquidations on Aave
item.description: A small pricing error in wstETH collateral caused $27 million in Aave liquidations, highlighting the critical role of price oracles and automated risk systems in DeFi.

item.title: Bitcoin eyes $75,000, nearing 25% bounce from February bottom
item.description: Gains came for crypto and stocks as tensions around the Strait of Hormuz appeared to ease slightly, sending oil prices lower.

item.title: Prediction markets boom on Iran bets as Congress eyes ban
item.description: Iran-linked contracts drove prediction market activity higher as the CFTC opened rulemaking and Democrats moved to ban war and death bets.

item.title: Three Ethereum indicators hint that $2.8K is the next ETH price target
item.description: A symmetrical triangle breakout and an unresolved supply overhang are boosting the case that Ether may go as high as $2,800 in March.

item.title: Steven Spielberg Is ‘Not For’ AI Replacing Creatives
item.description: The director of “A.I. Artificial Intelligence” told an audience at SXSW that he’s yet to use the technology in his films.

item.title: Bitcoin outperforms gold and stocks in global turmoil as ETFs and Strategy accumulate
item.description: Wall Street broker Bernstein took note of an institutional ownership shift as behind bitcoin's resilience during this latest bout of global turmoil.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) price jumps 8.8%, leading index higher
item.description: Polkadot (DOT), up 8.5% from Friday, joined Ethereum (ETH) as a top performer.

item.title: Crypto wealth platform Abra to go public through $750 million SPAC deal
item.description: The transaction is expected to deliver as much as $300 million in cash, which will be used to expand the company's institutional crypto lending, yield and custody offerings.

item.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Holds Strong as War Escalates
item.description: Crypto majors continue to outperform all other markets, as Bitcoin ETFs posted their first inflow streak of 2026.

item.title: Bitmine buys 60,999 ether as Tom Lee touts crypto strength amid Iran war
item.description: The ether treasury firm now holds nearly 4.6 million ETH, while maintaining a $1.2 billion cash position despite ramping up acquisitions.

item.title: 🚨NEW: The crypto tax roundtable that was postponed due to snow last month has been rescheduled for 4 p.m. ET this afternoon. The event will be hosted by @SteveDaines, @SenLummis and @RepMikeCarey. There are tornadoes in the D.C. area today, but - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE0zdy1Ha1BrZVhkd0YySFdHTDBEcDZCYWN5Um05NHVVejhXUGMyb21HMW13X0R2YjMtNkxFc1lockJQZ085SG9ZSkU5T3AwcHJ4UVY5SmsxLVlhUGFPUzBOQmFwU25MZw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: The crypto tax roundt…
